finance_snapshot.total_before_tax: Starting MSRP about $33,775 before tax, destination, and dealer fees.
finance_snapshot.apr: Toyota routes current finance offers through ZIP-based Local Specials.
finance_snapshot.finance_payment: Use Toyota Local Specials or a dealer quote.
finance_snapshot.finance_down_payment: Varies by ZIP, trim, and credit profile.
finance_snapshot.lease_payment: Use Toyota Local Specials or a dealer quote.
finance_snapshot.due_at_signing: Varies by ZIP, trim, and dealer.
finance_snapshot.incentives: Toyota's plug-in Prius page uses localized offer lookup; exact APR, lease payment, and due-at-signing figures were not exposed in static HTML.
finance_snapshot.warranty: Toyota New Vehicle Limited Warranty is 36 months/36,000 miles, with powertrain coverage at 60 months/60,000 miles. New Toyotas also include ToyotaCare no-cost maintenance and 24-hour roadside assistance. Hybrid and plug-in models use Toyota's electrified-vehicle warranty program, including the 10-year/150,000-mile hybrid battery coverage called out on Toyota's official electrified warranty page.
finance_snapshot.best_for: Short-distance commuters who can plug in and still want Toyota hybrid flexibility on longer trips.
finance_snapshot.financial_strengths: Plug-in fuel savings and Toyota electrified warranty coverage improve long-term value if the vehicle is charged regularly.
finance_snapshot.financial_concerns: Upfront price is higher than standard Prius, and local incentive visibility is limited without ZIP input.
finance_snapshot.notes: Snapshot uses Toyota US pricing on March 25, 2026. Toyota markets this model online via the Prius Plug-in Hybrid page.

image_strategy.note: Dataset stores one canonical local image per vehicle.
